name: Angle Peninsula Circular
highlights: Circuit of the western tip of the Pembrokeshire peninsula.
points_of_interest: Thorn Island fort; WWII defences; Angle lifeboat station
viewpoints: Milford Haven entrance; West Angle Bay
picnic_spots: West Angle Bay; East Angle Bay
food_drink_nearby: Old Point House Angle (pub on causeway); Café Môr Freshwater West
hazards_notes: Old Point House tide-cut at high water
